# init(stringLiteral:)

**Initializer**

Initializes a version struct with the provided string literal.

## Declaration

```swift
init(stringLiteral value: String)
```

## Parameters

- **value**: A string literal to use for creating a new version struct.
title: init(stringLiteral:)
